case_title: MARTHA GILLESBY VS. SPEC CAB CO., INC. DBA ARROW CAB et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,200.00 FILED BY GILLESBY, MARTHA AS TO DEFENDANT SPEC CAB CO., INC. DBA ARROW CAB LAWS JR, JOSHUA WHITTENBURG, RONNIE AKA EUGENE, RONNIE JINKS, SHANI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-05-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO SPECK CAB., INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50.00) SERVED JUL-08-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LAWS JR, JOSHUA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50.00) SERVED JUL-08-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SPEC CAB CO., INC. DBA ARROW CAB
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SPEC CAB CO., INC. DBA ARROW CAB

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-05-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-05-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS SHANI JINKS, RONNIE WHITTENBURG AND SPECK CAB. DEFENDANT JOSHUA LAWS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHANI JINKS AND RONNIE WHITTENBURG WAIVE SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO JOSHUA LAWS JR, AND SPEC CAB CO., INC. DBA ARROW CAB BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-05-2010 AT 3:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-05-2010 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GILLESBY, MARTHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITTENBURG, RONNIE AKA EUGENE, RONNIE JINKS, SHANI $5,875.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,050.00, DEFENDANT SPEC CAB AND JOSHUA LAWS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH LIABILTY FOR THESE DEFENDANTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED SENT TO RONNIE WHITTENBURG.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED SENT TO SHANI JINKS.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WHITTENBURG, RONNIE AKA EUGENE, RONNIE JINKS, SHANI
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
